description: A flaw has been found in PHPGurukul Curfew e-Pass Management System 1.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the file view-pass-detail.php. This manipulation of the argument Fullname/Category causes cross site scripting. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.
